headline: BofA Remains a Buy on Caterpillar Inc. (CAT)
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is one of the Good Stocks to Buy Now. On March 10, Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) was reiterated with a Buy rating from Bank of America Securities and a price target of $825. ​The analyst noted that he co-hosted a call with Williams Companies CEO Chad Zamarin. The discussion implied a positive outlook […]
